query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'completed_job_batches' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT * FROM completed_job_batches ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'completed_job_batches' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT * FROM completed_job_batches ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

rows.COLUMN_NAME: id	filename	jobDate	totalCount	sentCount	positiveCount	negativeCount	reviewConfirmedCount	uploadedAt
